hooks.command: file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && pnpm --prefix /home/antonis/source/my-wallet exec prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true
file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && pnpm --prefix /home/antonis/source/my-wallet lint 2>&1 | tail -40 || true
